aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期有望继续上涨。
【关键位置】
71,000 美元是关键支撑位，突破 72,500 美元将打开更高涨幅空间。
【短线策略】
可以考虑在 71,000 美元附近吸纳，目标位 73,000 美元。
【风险提醒】
注意风险，仓位控制在 20% 以内。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin is expected to continue its upward trend in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
$71,000 is the key support level, and breaking through $72,500 will open up more upside space.
[Outlook]
Consider buying around $71,000, with a target of $73,000.
[Reminder]
Be aware of the risks and control positions within 20%.
